# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

# Use an official multi-stage build image as the base
FROM golang:1.17 AS builder

# Set the working directory in the container
WORKDIR /app

# Copy the go.mod and go.sum files to download all dependencies
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

# Copy the source code to the container
COPY . .

# Build the application
RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build -a -installsuffix cgo -o app

# Create a new stage for running the application
FROM alpine:latest

# Set the working directory in the container
WORKDIR /app

# Copy the built application from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /app/app .

# Expose necessary ports
EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379

# Start the multi-service application
CMD ["./app"]
